properties.entry: SELECT Asset.dataSourceAssetPK FROM Asset JOIN AssetKeyword ON Asset.id = AssetKeyword.assetId WHERE Asset.assetType = "Page" AND AssetKeyword.keyword = :keyword GROUP BY Asset.dataSourceAssetPK ORDER BY Asset.dataSourceAssetPK
SELECT AssetKeyword.keyword FROM Asset JOIN AssetKeyword ON Asset.id = AssetKeyword.assetId WHERE Asset.assetType = :assetType GROUP BY AssetKeyword.keyword ORDER BY AssetKeyword.keyword
